name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- adds the new comments review flow with company selection, project pickers, review-video lists, inline playback, timeline markers, and draggable comment threads behind the existing desktop feature gate
- tightens the full shell again so the panel feels more packed, flatter, and closer to a Frame.io-style extension instead of roomy dashboard cards
- keeps proxy controls and comment surfaces visually denser with smaller radii, tighter spacing, and cleaner hierarchy across Home, Proxies, and Comments
